user_message: Can you work with me on partner engagement for Lucerne Publishing? We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-06 08:39 EST
Subject: Re: Re: partner engagement Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with partner engagement. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-02-28 09:58 EST
Subject: partner engagement - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with partner engagement. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 11:01 EST
Subject: partner engagement - Action Required

Just checking in on the partner engagement proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-N trap (No native 'commitment-to-milestone' workflow primitive); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-N failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-N failure mode (No native 'commitment-to-milestone' workflow primitive)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct partner engagement decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-N -- No native 'commitment-to-milestone' workflow primitive
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
